Name: UPawnMovementComponent

Functions.Name: AddInputVector
Functions.Description:
Adds the given vector to the accumulated input in world space. Input vectors are usually between 0 and 1 in magnitude. 
	  They are accumulated during a frame then applied as acceleration during the movement update.

Params.Name: bForce
Params.Description: If true always add the input, ignoring the result of IsMoveInputIgnored().

Functions.Name: GetPendingInputVector
Functions.Description:
Return the pending input vector in world space. This is the most up-to-date value of the input vector, pending ConsumeMovementInputVector() which clears it.
	  PawnMovementComponents implementing movement usually want to use either this or ConsumeInputVector() as these functions represent the most recent state of input.

Return.Description: The pending input vector in world space.

Functions.Name: GetLastInputVector
Functions.Description:
Return the last input vector in world space that was processed by ConsumeInputVector(), which is usually done by the Pawn or PawnMovementComponent.
	 Any user that needs to know about the input that last affected movement should use this function.

Return.Description: The last input vector in world space that was processed by ConsumeInputVector().

Functions.Name: ConsumeInputVector
Functions.Description:
Returns the pending input vector and resets it to zero.
	  This should be used during a movement update (by the Pawn or PawnMovementComponent) to prevent accumulation of control input between frames.
	  Copies the pending input vector to the saved input vector (GetLastMovementInputVector()).

Functions.Name: IsMoveInputIgnored
Functions.Description: Helper to see if move input is ignored. If there is no Pawn or UpdatedComponent, returns true, otherwise defers to the Pawn's implementation of IsMoveInputIgnored().

Functions.Name: GetPawnOwner
Functions.Description: Return the Pawn that owns UpdatedComponent.

Functions.Name: K2_GetInputVector
Functions.Description: (Deprecated) Return the input vector in world space.
